name: Sumant Singh
title: General Manager
subtitle: Luxury Hotels & Resorts | Performance-Driven Leadership
biographyText: A progressive, results-driven hospitality leader with over 16 years of experience across ultra-luxury hotels, destination wellness resorts, and premium branded service properties in Southeast Asia, East Africa, and India.

Demonstrated expert in directing complex guest-service portfolios, elevating GOP by up to 42%, accelerating Average Room Rates (ARR) by ~40-60%, and consistently delivering world-class service quality benchmarks (Accor Luxe LQA, Frasers Quality Audits). Experienced in managing large scale assets, premium key renovations, and multi-cultural workforces of 300+ professionals.
A passionate steward of ecological responsibility, waste reduction, and community alignment, leading properties to national sustainability honors.

metrics.label: ARR & RevPAR Escalation
metrics.desc: Consistently driving premium yielding and high market share (MPI) across luxury cluster operations.

metrics.label: GOP Yield Amplification
metrics.desc: Executing strict cost control and labor efficiency metrics to deliver peak profitability.

metrics.label: Digital Reputation Score
metrics.desc: Elevating guest experience indicators, Net Promoter Scores (NPS), and social indices to market-leading positions.

metrics.label: LQA Audit Maximums
metrics.desc: Delivering flawless service compliance metrics under strict, luxury-level standard operational audits.

philosophyIntro: A luxury hospitality stewardship model driven by balanced, performance-based values:

philosophyItems.desc: Thoughtful guest delight, luxury standards compliance (LQA Expert), and premium brand equity preservation.
Aggressive ARR/RevPAR growth, yield optimization, and new high-performance commercial sales channels.
Disciplined operations, responsible financial controls, and optimized GOP delivery for hotel stakeholders.
Total productive asset preservation, pristine structural care, and product longevity safeguarding.
Cultivating positive culture, team growth, safety compliance, and comprehensive corporate responsibility.
Securing national and international hospitality awards, certificates, and regional satisfaction milestones.

details: Directing complete operational, commercial, and service portfolio of the high-end property in central Bangkok.
Achieved the **GRI Excellence Award 2026** for leading the *Best Fraser Hotel in Guest Satisfaction* across entire South East Asia and Australia.
Secured the prestigious **Thailand Green Hotel Golden Award** from Green Hotel Thailand for exceptional sustainability initiatives.
Executing targeted commercial and yield initiatives to capture maximum occupancy, RevPAR, and GOP margin.
Elevating brand score, digital reputation indices, and guest delight across key distribution channels.
Safeguarding asset integrity and quality standards through systematic preventive maintenance cycles.

timeline.company: The Ajit Bhawan & Rawla Narlai (Heritage Luxury Portfolio)
details: Managed operations and workforce of 300+ professionals across two heritage resort products.
Increased Average Room Rate (ARR) by **~40%** and drove a **32% escalation in total portfolio revenue**.
Boosted GOP margin from **33% to 42%**, securing the highest yield performance within the company's hotels.
Elevated digital guest scores from **82% to 94.6%** and advanced TripAdvisor rank from **#21 to #8**.
Supervised premium guestroom restorations and achieved a **92% Planned Maintenance Program (PMP)** index.
Steered full commercial and operational performance for the high-end coastal wellness resort.
Generated ARR and total revenue increments of **approximately 60%**.
Delivered the resort's first-ever profitable fiscal year, followed by a **₹6 crore (~$720k USD) GOP performance**.
Elevated guest satisfaction index from **72% to 92%**, securing **TripAdvisor Rank #1**.
Expanded high-yield leisure and destination wedding segments through strategic local engagement.

timeline.role: Resort Operations Manager / Acting Hotel Manager
timeline.company: Avista Hideaway MGallery Hotel Collection (Accor Luxe)
details: Directed cross-functional resort operations, leading a premium team of 200+ colleagues.
Achieved **45% ARR improvement** and amplified repeat guest business contribution by **15%**.
Boosted Reputation Performance (RPS) from **85% to 92%** and Net Promoter Score (NPS) from **30 to 80+**.
Secured exceptional scores of **94.2% on MGallery Brand Core Standards** and **92% on Accor Luxe LQA audit**.
Successfully oversaw refurbishments of premium villas and implemented full-scale productive maintenance.
Oversaw front office networks across four distinct properties inside a 500-acre resort destination complex.
Optimized front office operations, guest check-in automation, and guest relation processes.
Supervised guest service ecosystems for Uganda's premier luxury resort cluster (449 keys, 59 Presidential Suites).
Coordinated protocol operations during major diplomatic events, international summits, and state delegations.
Led guest relation operations and lobby services for a premium 250-room hotel.
Acted as primary operational support during peak operational times to guarantee brand alignment.
Supported signature guest services at the world-renowned resort product.
Honored as **Employee of the Year** and secured multiple monthly commendations for guest delight.
Coordinated front desk check-in experiences and guest relations inside the major film city luxury product.

executiveAwards.text: Achieved the prestigious Golden Award at Fraser Suites Sukhumvit Bangkok. Recognized for high-level ecological dedication, environmental responsibility, waste reduction strategies, and leading sustainable luxury hospitality initiatives.
